hero.badge: Built for businesses · audit-ready in 48 hours
hero.body: A4 Services gives your business a complete AI-powered audit team — 8 specialist agents that handle planning, risk, fieldwork, compliance and reporting. Transparent, professional, and a fraction of traditional audit cost.
hero.freePill: ✦ Your first full audit engagement — completely free. No contract.

c1.title: Built by a licensed audit firm
c1.desc: Developed by A4 Services Limited — a licensed audit and accounting practice. Not a tech startup guessing at audit.

c2.title: 100% of your general ledger reviewed
c2.desc: Our GL Anomaly Agent tests every single transaction — not a sample. Duplicate entries, unusual journals, late postings all flagged.

c3.title: Your data stays yours
c3.desc: SOC 2 certified infrastructure, GDPR compliant. Your documents and financials are never shared or used to train models.

c4.title: White-labelled to your firm
c4.desc: The client portal, all communications and documents are branded under your accountancy firm. Clients never see A4 Services.

agents.sub: Each agent owns a precise stage of your audit engagement. Click any agent to learn more.

how.sub: The Orchestrator Agent receives your engagement brief and intelligently dispatches every specialist agent — coordinating the entire audit in real time.

portal.title: Complete visibility.
portal.sub: Your client portal gives you complete oversight of the audit progress, document requests, and final reports.

pricing.sub: A fraction of the cost of traditional audit firms. Pay a flat fee per audit.

basic.name: Standard Audit
basic.desc: Perfect for growing businesses. A complete, compliant audit without the overhead.

pro.name: Complex Audit
pro.desc: For groups, consolidated accounts, and complex international structures.

cta.sub: Set up your free account today and experience a modern, AI-driven audit engagement.
